PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?game ?duration_minutes WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q1422771 ; wdt:P585 ?event_date ; wdt:P1545 wd:Q334634 ; wdt:P1545 wd:Q650840 .
  FILTER(YEAR(?event_date) > 1978)
  ?game wdt:P1544 ?series ; wdt:P1227 ?duration .
  BIND(xsd:integer(REPLACE(STR(?duration) , "PT(\\d+)H(\\d+)M" , "$1 * 60 + $2")) AS ?duration_minutes)
  FILTER(isNumeric(?duration_minutes))
}
ORDER BY ?duration_minutes
LIMIT 3
OFFSET 2
